nasb.text: Foolishness is bound up in the heart of a child; The rod of discipline will remove it far from him.

esv.text: Folly is bound up in the heart of a child, but the rod of discipline drives it far from him.

cnv.text: 愚妄束縛孩童的心， 管教的杖可以把愚妄遠遠驅除。

ccb.text: 愚昧缠住孩童的心， 教棍能远远赶走它。

csbs.text: 愚妄缠在孩子的心里， 管教的杖使愚妄远离。
